positive: Minimalist, high-contrast illustration of a whimsical woodland scene. A stylized deer silhouette stands beneath a large, gently glowing moon. The background features abstract, flowing flora, including bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate swirling vines. The composition is balanced and centered, with a strong focus on clean black lines against a limited, soft pastel color palette (deep navy, muted teal, pale gold). Style: Vector art, intricate line work, negative space utilization. Ideal for apparel print on a solid background. Crisp details, high clarity, symmetrical composition.
negative: text, words, signature, logo, watermark, blur, jpeg artifacts, noise, low resolution, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, grayscale, photorealistic, messy, cluttered, gradient (unless bioluminescent), messy background
